name: ConvertFrom-Markdown

options.name: -AsVT100EncodedString
options.description: Specifies if the output should be encoded as a string with VT100 escape codes.

options.name: -InputObject
options.description: Specifies the object to be converted. When an object of type System.String is specified, the string is converted. When an object of type System.IO.FileInfo is specified, the contents of the file specified by the object are converted. Objects of any other type result in an error.

name: -LiteralPath
-PSPath
-LP
options.description: Specifies a path to the file to be converted.

options.name: -Path
options.description: Specifies a path to the file to be converted.

description: Convert the contents of a string or a file to a MarkdownInfo object.
